from_number_id: Id of the number from your business to make the call from
to_number: International number starting with +(country code)(local number) to make the call to
dynamic_variables: Dynamic json property values to be used in your prompt/script
override_retry_on_call_declined: Override default retry on call declined
override_retry_on_missed_call: Override default retry on call missed or busy
override_agent_id: Override the agent to use in call
override_agent_script_id: Override the default agent script for the default agent or override agent
override_agent_language_code: Override the default language to be used on the call by the agent
override_agent_timezones: Override the list of timezones to be given to the agent
